description: One compact JSON object per line. Store orchestration evidence, not raw chat.

fields.timestamp: ISO-8601 time when the event was observed.
fields.stateId: Active discussion state ID, or null for direct-expert event-only flow.
fields.targetAgent: Expert account or bot user ID when relevant.
fields.workType: qa | discussion | research | ops-change | diagnostic | participation | scheduled | silent-record
fields.action: reaction | opened-state | assigned | replied | summarized | closed | gated | reviewed
fields.reviewTags: Short strings used by periodic review.
